themes.name: Agentic AI in research
themes.description: Articles discussing AI agents that can autonomously perform research tasks, such as data gathering, analysis, and report generation.

themes.name: AI coding assistants
themes.description: Content focused on AI tools that assist developers in writing, debugging, and understanding code.

themes.name: AI summarization
themes.description: Articles detailing AI's ability to condense large amounts of text, such as meeting transcripts or research papers, into concise summaries.

themes.name: AI recruitment research
themes.description: Research and discussions on how AI impacts job markets, hiring practices, and potential job displacement.

themes.name: AI for product management
themes.description: How AI is being used to aid product managers in areas like strategy, feature prioritization, and identifying product issues.

themes.name: AI research tools
themes.description: A collection of articles highlighting and reviewing various AI-powered tools designed for research purposes.

themes.name: AI chatbot research
themes.description: Focuses on the use of AI chatbots in research, including their capabilities, limitations, and user interactions.

themes.name: AI customer insights
themes.description: Content related to using AI to understand customer behavior, preferences, and feedback.

themes.name: Synthetic users
themes.description: Discussions around the creation and use of AI-generated personas or synthetic data to simulate user interactions or testing.

themes.name: AI for design & research
themes.description: Articles that explore the integration of AI into the design and research process, covering a broad range of applications.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources, Google News, HackerNews, and DEV.to this month.
